metal_scraps.name: Metal Scraps
metal_scraps.description: Twisted pieces of hull plating and structural supports. Useful for building and crafting.

wire.name: Wire
wire.description: Lengths of copper and fiber-optic cabling salvaged from the wreckage.

torn_fabric.name: Torn Fabric
torn_fabric.description: Scraps of durable ship fabric. Worn but still strong enough to be useful.

basic_tools.name: Basic Tools
basic_tools.description: A collection of wrenches, pliers, and a multi-driver. The essentials.

luminous_moss.name: Luminous Moss
luminous_moss.description: Softly glowing moss from the coral thicket. It pulses with a gentle blue-green light.

resin.name: Resin
resin.description: Thick, amber-colored resin from coral growths. Hardens quickly and bonds well.

seeds.name: Seeds
seeds.description: Hardy seeds from coral-adapted plants. They could grow in {seed_name}-nourished soil.

coral_fragments.name: Coral Fragments
coral_fragments.description: Broken pieces of crystallized coral. Sharp-edged and surprisingly strong.

ancient_alloys.name: Ancient Alloys
ancient_alloys.description: Metal from the frozen wreck, made of alloys unknown to any living smith. Dense, dark, and warm to the touch.

frozen_water.name: Frozen Water
frozen_water.description: Ice from the frozen wreck. Pure and clean once thawed — precious in the void.

preserved_food.name: Preserved Food
preserved_food.description: Vacuum-sealed rations from the frozen wreck. Ancient but still edible.

crystal_shards.name: Crystal Shards
crystal_shards.description: Fragments of crystalline material that hum faintly. They react to {seed_name}'s presence.

rope.name: Rope
rope.description: Strong braided cord made from fabric and resin. Essential for building.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: A wire-wrapped bundle of luminous moss that casts a soft, steady glow.
aspects: A Light That Won't Go Out

shelter_patch.name: Shelter Patch
shelter_patch.description: A sturdy patch of fabric and coral for repairing structures.

water_filter.name: Water Filter
water_filter.description: A crystal and resin filtration device. Purifies void-mist into drinkable water.

signal_beacon.name: Signal Beacon
signal_beacon.description: A powerful light that can be seen far across the void. Might attract help — or trouble.
aspects: Draws Eyes From Across the Void

khaki_jumpsuit.name: Khaki Jumpsuit
khaki_jumpsuit.description: A sturdy khaki jumpsuit, the kind you'd wear for fieldwork. Scuffed at the knees and elbows but still holding together.

work_boots.name: Work Boots
work_boots.description: Worn-in leather work boots. They've seen better days but they're broken in just right.

red_sundress.name: Red Sundress
red_sundress.description: A cheerful red sundress, incongruous against the void. It's the kind of thing you'd wear to a garden party, not the end of the world.

canvas_flats.name: Canvas Flats
canvas_flats.description: Simple canvas flats, slightly muddy. Comfortable enough for a long day on your feet.

scattered_notes.name: Scattered Notes
scattered_notes.description: A botanist's journal, water-stained and fragile. The handwriting grows more frantic toward the end: 'Growth accelerating beyond parameters. The root system has breached containment. The heart chamber is sealed but I can hear it pulsing through the walls.'
